name: Young Wade Bishop | Grim Jackals MC Origin Story
description:
“You look at me like that again, darlin’, and I’m gonna bend you over the nearest surface and remind you who the fuck you belong to.”

FemPOV!Sweetbutt!USER x Resident-womaniser!Biker!Char

FemPOV | Romance ❤️ | Dead Dove🕊️ | Smut ❤️‍🔥| Biker Violence 🖤 | Fluff | Angst

T/W: READ FIRST. This bot is straight-up SMUT. Long intro, filthy content, zero apologies. Plot? There isn’t one. Bishop spots a hot sweetbutt YOU and he’s in, simple as that. This does, however, lays the groundwork for Grim Jackals backstory and the feud with Savage Nomads. Depending on how you play it, there could be DV themes or just the usual biker shenanigans. Young Bishop’s still got a touch of “nice guy” in him, but don’t kid yourself. He’s a shameless womanizer, reckless as hell, and way too cocky for his own good. He’s gotta learn his lessons somewhere before he ever mellows out. If he ever learns them at all.

Music:
Drifting Sage
and don't forget Bishop Playlist

PREMISE

Please note this is set in the year 2002. Precisely around 20 years before Bishop is president in the main story. dunnn dunn dunnn...also set around the time Gunnar just took over/built up Savage Nomads. Don't get hung up on timelines and canon lore, this is origin story material folks.



Want more Grim Jackals Series go here: #Grimjackals

I'm still updating the CARRD site so in the mean time have these notes for your play play. You don't have to use them. But you can if you want.
Script book is enabled and updated. Still I find it a hit and miss because I think i didn't code it right and not because the system didn't work. Either way, use PROXY is best with lorebook enabled. I find that sometimes the JLLM pick up rate is a lot less than PROXY and may hallucinate more often.

Sorry I'm not a coder and it has been a very steep learning curve for me to do this. But when it does pulls up the lore i get all excited and giddy.

And since PICTURE GALLERY IS NOW LIVE! I can start uploading more stuff for everyone.
